MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-28-2010 IN 206, DEFENDANTS KATHY KNOERL AND THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL JOSEPH SMITH APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA. ATTORNEY KATHLEEN DARMAGNAC APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/24/10 IS CONTINUED TO 9/13/10 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED, AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLAINTIFF WAIVED NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL JOSEPH SMITH'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THIS MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED, THE PROPOSED CAUSES OF ACTION ARE COGNIZABLE. ALSO, PLAINTIFF MAY NOT NAME THE INDIVIDUALS ON THE TORTIOUS DISCHARGE CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE SUCH A CLAIM MAY ONLY BE BROUGHT AGAINST AN EMPLOYER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL JOSEPH SMITH Motion for Leave to File First Amended Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: This motion for leave to file a first amended complaint is denied, the proposed causes of action are cognizable. Also, Plaintiff may not name the individuals on the tortious discharge cause of action because such a claim may only be brought against an employer. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797
